series_metadata.series_title: News Releases, Media Advisories, Agency Updates and Announcements
series_metadata.series_description: Files created to manage news releases, media advisories, event announcements and agency updates Files may include: E-mail distribution lists, e-mail confirmations, return notices, statistical data, address information, supporting documentation and any additional record generated similarly.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Maintain three (3) state fiscal years following year issued. Review by State Archives historical value before disposal. when deemed of no value by agency and State Archives. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Maintain three (3) state fiscal years following year issued. Review by State Archives historical value before disposal. when deemed of no value by agency and State Archives. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
